detectionMethod.title: Detection Method
detectionMethod.description: Active detection method — switchable at runtime from the dashboard

threshold.title: Detection Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum confidence score to trigger doorbell (0.1–1.0)

audioDevice.title: Audio Device Index
audioDevice.description: PyAudio input device index (leave empty for default)

wsPort.title: WebSocket Port
wsPort.description: Port for live audio/detection WebSocket stream to UI

pythonPath.title: Python Path
pythonPath.description: Path to Python 3 binary (leave empty for auto-detection)

autoStart.title: Auto-start Detection
autoStart.description: Start detection automatically when Homebridge starts
